name: data-warehouse-analytics-report-scheduler
description: T179 ReportScheduler — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. scheduleAt must be in future at scheduling time. Report config from FREEDOM config. DNA-8: storeDocument before enqueue for scheduled jobs.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: scheduleAt must be in future, report config from FREEDOM config, DNA-8 storeDocument before enqueue for delayed jobs
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + future-schedule-guard + freedom-report-config + store-before-enqueue patterns for T179

Break T179 into: receive schedule request → validate scheduleAt > now() → load report template from FREEDOM config → storeDocument(scheduledReport, status=PENDING) → enqueue delayed job at scheduleAt → return scheduledReportId

Generate report-scheduler.service.ts — HTTP POST via DynamicController, validates scheduleAt is strictly in future (SCHEDULE_IN_PAST error if not). Report template and output format from FREEDOM config. DNA-8: storeDocument(scheduledReport) BEFORE enqueue. Enqueue delayed job targeting scheduleAt timestamp. Returns scheduledReportId.
Named check validation: schedule_at_future_validated, schedule_in_past_rejected, freedom_report_config_loaded, store_before_enqueue, scheduled_report_id_returned
Score generated code 0-100 against T179 iron rules: future scheduleAt guard, FREEDOM report config, DNA-8 store-before-enqueue, correct ID return
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=future-guard+freedom-config+store-before-enqueue, rejected=past-schedule-accepted OR hardcoded-report-template OR enqueue-before-store. curriculumTier=1.
